did_this_paper_use_ai_to_obtain_results_.details: The paper implements a Verilog-based FPGA system for classical digital image processing techniques (contrast, brightness, gray level, invert, and thresholding) to enhance skin lesion images. It does not use AI, machine learning, or deep learning algorithms; the processing is rule-based and deterministic.

non_compliance_reason: The paper does not use AI to obtain results in dermatology.
